sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import './CitizenDashboard.css'; const Dashboard = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [user, setUser] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { // Check authentication const token = localStorage.getItem('token'); const storedUser = localStorage.getItem('user'); if (!token || !storedUser) { navigate('/login'); return; } try { const parsedUser = JSON.parse(storedUser); // Optional: Redirect admin/rescue to their specific dashboards if needed // but for now we just set the user for Citizen Dashboard setUser(parsedUser); } catch (e) { localStorage.clear(); navigate('/login'); } }, [navigate]); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.clear(); navigate('/login'); }; if (!user) return null; return (
